name: supy-wingspan
description: AI-assisted engineering standards for Supy repos: stack-aware review agents (NestJS backend + Angular frontend + Flutter mobile + standalone Firebase Functions backend + standalone commander.js CLI + polyglot AI-agents monorepo + Kubernetes config), a stack-agnostic secrets reviewer that blocks committed credentials, scaffolding and Git skills, a consistency baseline generator, and orchestration wrappers over superpowers.
